response.answer:
Schedule tasks live in the project Schedule page:

- Route: `/[projectId]/schedule`
- Source file: `frontend/src/app/(main)/[projectId]/schedule/page.tsx`
- Curated help article: `docs/help/articles/schedule.md`

That’s the documented user-facing location for managing project schedule items, including tasks. I also found a separate route-discovered page at:

- Route: `/[projectId]/meetings/schedule`
- Source file: `frontend/src/app/(main)/[projectId]/meetings/schedule/page.tsx`

But that entry is implementation evidence only and has no linked help article, so I would not treat it as the primary schedule-task location.

Checked:
- App Expert artifact status: available and fresh
- Feature registry: `Schedule` documented
- App sitemap: `/[projectId]/schedule` documented

If you want, I can also summarize what the Schedule page supports by view type.

toolTrace.detail: App Expert produced an answer from read-only app knowledge tools.
